rules.name: Check Connections
rules.description: Tests connectivity to SIMDNIT and SUPRA databases before any other check

rules.name: Medições: SIMDNIT >= SUPRA
rules.description: Checks that SIMDNIT has at least as many measurement records as SUPRA (TB_SIAC_MEDICAO_MAIOR). Blocks if SIMDNIT lost rows.

rules.name: Contratos: SIMDNIT >= SUPRA
rules.description: Checks that SIMDNIT has at least as many contract records as SUPRA (TB_SIAC_CONTRATO). Blocks if SIMDNIT lost rows.

rules.name: Aditivos: SIMDNIT >= SUPRA
rules.description: Checks that SIMDNIT has at least as many additive term records as SUPRA (TB_SIAC_TERMO_ADITIVO). Blocks if SIMDNIT lost rows.

rules.name: Empenhos: SIMDNIT >= SUPRA
rules.description: Checks that SIMDNIT has at least as many commitment records as SUPRA (TB_SIAC_EMPENHO). Blocks if SIMDNIT lost rows.

rules.name: Date Regression (1900)
rules.description: For all configured tables: checks that valid dates in SUPRA (year != 1900) have not been replaced by 1900 in SIMDNIT. Covers contracts, measurements, additive terms and commitments.

rules.name: Contract Value Arithmetic
rules.description: In SIMDNIT (dbo.Dados_Contrato): checks that VALOR_INICIAL + VALOR_TOTAL_DE_REAJUSTE + VALOR_TOTAL_DE_ADITIVOS equals VALOR_INICIAL_ADIT_REAJUSTES. Reports contracts where this equation does not hold.

rules.name: SUPRA Data Integrity
rules.description: Per-contract row count check for TB_SIAC_EMPENHO, TB_SIAC_MEDICAO_MAIOR and TB_SIAC_REAJUSTE: alerts when SIMDNIT has fewer rows than SUPRA for any individual contract (possible erroneous deletion or modification in SIMDNIT).
